title: crotalaria distantiflora
intro: Crotalaria distantiflora, also known as the small-flowered rattlebox or small-flowered crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Crotalaria distantiflora is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use may require caution due to potential toxicity.
